nasb.text: So then, when the Lord Jesus had spoken to them, He was received up into heaven and sat down at the right hand of God.

esv.text: So then the Lord Jesus, after he had spoken to them, was taken up into heaven and sat down at the right hand of God.

cnv.text: 主耶穌向門徒講完了話，就被接到天上，坐在　神的右邊。

ccb.text: 主耶稣说完这些话，就被接回天上，坐在上帝的右边。

csbs.text: 这样，主耶稣对他们说完话以后，就被接到天上，坐在神的右边。
